history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle shot focuses on the face of a young East Asian person wearing a red and black motorcycle helmet. The helmet's black mesh padding is visible on the sides, contrasting with the bright red shell of the helmet. The person's face is turned slightly to the left, with their lips pursed in a pout. Their dark, slightly messy hair peeks out from under the helmet. A faint mustache is visible above the upper lip. The person is wearing a brown hoodie with a light grey inner lining visible around the neck. The hoodie has drawstrings tied in a knot at the bottom. The background is blurred and appears to be indoors, with hints of dark metal bars or shelving. The lighting is somewhat dim, with a soft light illuminating the subject's face, creating a slightly moody atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by the warm brown of the hoodie, the red and black of the helmet, and the subject's skin tone. The overall mood is casual and perhaps a bit playful due to the facial expression.
